slides.content:
'À la fin, donc aujourd'hui, je t'aime'
An artistic dialogue with visual artist Cecile Giovannini, combining her paintings 
and my poems

Photos © Serena Porcher-Carli

This project is envisaged as a continuous process, with no final form or timing. 
It evolves and adapts to its environment.
From May to October 2024, we were invited by the Flore-Alpe botanical garden (Champex-Lac, Switzerland) for a residency.
We immersed ourselves in the garden, bringing along finished and ongoing works, new ideas and explorations. From this, new works emerged, and the whole was presented as an outdoor exhibition.
